articles.title: France municipal elections enter final campaign day
articles.summary: Campaigning intensifies across major cities in France as candidates prepare for the upcoming municipal elections. Analysts say the vote could reshape political alliances at the local level ahead of future national contests.

articles.title: United States presidential campaign expands across key states
articles.summary: Candidates continue to travel across battleground states presenting economic and security policies as voters prepare for upcoming primary contests.

articles.title: European markets open cautiously as investors monitor inflation data
articles.summary: Stock markets across Europe opened cautiously on Wednesday as investors assessed new inflation indicators and central bank policy expectations.

articles.title: India strengthens technology manufacturing strategy
articles.summary: India's government announced new incentives aimed at expanding semiconductor and digital manufacturing sectors as part of its global trade strategy.

articles.title: Nigeria infrastructure programme targets regional trade expansion
articles.summary: Nigeria continues to prioritize large infrastructure projects designed to improve transport corridors and boost economic cooperation across West Africa.

articles.title: Artificial intelligence investment continues global expansion
articles.summary: Major technology firms in North America, Europe and Asia are increasing investment in artificial intelligence research and development facilities.

articles.title: International football competitions enter decisive stage
articles.summary: Several major football leagues across Europe approach crucial fixtures that could determine championship outcomes and continental qualification.

articles.title: Global diplomatic discussions focus on trade and security cooperation
articles.summary: Diplomatic meetings between major economies continue this week with a focus on trade policy, technology cooperation and regional security issues.
